rules.rule_text:
title: Phishing Lure in S3 Bucket
id: c67ed899-a5d8-4a13-97ce-7ee3ceb2d487
description: It is common for phishing lures to be served from S3 buckets of various
  cloud providers
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: '2022-10-17'
modified: '2023-05-16'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  post_to_php:
    cs-method: POST
    c-uri|endswith: .php
  objectstorage_referer_misc:
    cs-referer|contains:
    - .linodeobjects.com
    - .digitaloceanspaces.com
    - .dream.io
    - .wasabisys.com
    - .vultrobjects.com
    - .backblazeb2.com
    - storageapi.fleek.co
    - .blob.core.windows.net
    - .r2.dev
  objectstorage_referer_aws:
    cs-referer|endswith: .amazonaws.com
    cs-referer|re: \bs3\b
  condition: post_to_php and 1 of objectstorage_referer*
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
tags:
- attack.initial_access
